narrative: External source 203.0.113.50 submitted 47 failed SSH authentication attempts in 5 minutes, iterating 12 distinct usernames from common attack wordlists (admin, root, user, test, oracle, postgres, ubuntu, centos, guest, ftpuser, mysql, www-data). The composite rule 5712 (SSH brute force) also fired on the same agent during the same window. No successful login followed. External source + high-volume + wordlist-style username diversity is the defining shape of this archetype; escalated as a true positive. No trust anchor applies — external brute-force is adversarial by definition.

rule.description: Attempt to login using a non-existent user
